description: Metadata describing a Salesforce SObject type, including its fields, relationships, and capabilities.
name: SObjectDescribe

name.description: The API name of the SObject type.

label.description: The user-facing singular label for this object type.

labelPlural.description: The user-facing plural label for this object type.

keyPrefix.description: The three-character key prefix used in record IDs for this type.

queryable.description: Whether records of this type can be queried with SOQL.

searchable.description: Whether records of this type can be searched with SOSL.

createable.description: Whether new records of this type can be created via the API.

updateable.description: Whether existing records of this type can be updated via the API.

deletable.description: Whether records of this type can be deleted via the API.

fields.description: Detailed metadata for each field on this SObject type.

name.description: The API name of the field.

label.description: The user-facing label for this field.

type.description: The data type of the field (e.g., string, boolean, date, reference, picklist).

nillable.description: Whether this field can be set to null.

updateable.description: Whether this field can be updated via the API.

createable.description: Whether this field can be set when creating a record.

length.description: Maximum character length for string fields. Zero for non-string fields.

urls.description: Map of REST endpoint URLs for this SObject type.
